description: Style Note provogue lets you feel alive with this exquisite black leather belt. It will give you a slick and chic look with it's continental touch that allows you to wear it with a pair of semi-formal light coloured trouser on a sandy beach. After all, it feels good to look good. Product Details Black leather for men Has a metal buckle with brand logo Material and Care Leather Use polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Style NoteProvogue lets you feel alive with this exquisite black leather belt.
